steps.title: Match subject and time
steps.content: The subject is the singular noun "painting," and "Currently" signals present time. The verb must therefore be singular and present tense.

steps.title: Reject tense mismatches
steps.content: A is simple past. C is past progressive. D is future perfect. All three conflict with the present-time signal. The remaining verb is singular present tense and agrees with "painting." The answer is B.
